title: Find the Treasure
description: Adds a little treasure digging mechanic.
body:
A very simple mod that generates buried treasures for you to find.

Right click with a shovel in the new buried treasure block.

This mod with real camera mod:

![https://i.imgur.com/77Hbry2.gif](https://i.imgur.com/77Hbry2.gif)



Things that you can find:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Deadbush - Common

2. Stick - Common

3. Coal - Common

4. Bone - Common

5. Flint - Common

6. Iron nugget - Uncommon

7. Gold Nugget - Uncommon

8. Iron ingot - Uncommon

9. Gold ingot - Uncommon

10. Compass - Uncommon

.him

12. Emerald - Rare

13. Diamond - Rare

</details>

This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
